log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.

→ melee_spell attack: [d20:5+3=8 vs AC 20] MISS.
ACTION: Cast Sacred Flame (Level 0). DC 11 DEX save on Half-Elf — Armored Escapist.
→ Half-Elf — Armored Escapist: DEX save [d20:14+6=20 vs DC 11] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Half-Elf — Armored Escapist --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 5 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):12+1=13 vs DC 15] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):15+1=16 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):19+1=20 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):7+1=8 vs DC 15] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:17+4=21 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ 2/5 targets affected.
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 14 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Half-Elf — Armored Escapist: FAIL! 30 fire damage + .
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
